info.title: Data API
info.description: Aggregate OpenAPI 3.1 document for all enterprise modules, generated from FCG InterfaceSpecs.

post.description:
POST /data/avatar/generate

Generate (or resolve) an avatar for a given record.
For AI-generated avatars the result is persisted as a file record and
the fileId is returned so callers can write it back to the record.

POST /data/avatar/generate

Generate (or resolve) an avatar for a given record.
For AI-generated avatars the result is persisted as a file record and
the fileId is returned so callers can write it back to the record.

key.description: Programmatic key stored on model field definitions (e.g. "string", "currency")

description.description: What this field type stores and where it is typically used

category.description: Logical grouping used in UI pickers

variant.description: Badge color variant used when rendering this field type

default.description: When true, this type is pre-selected when creating a new field

sortOrder.description: Display order in selection lists (lower = first)

fileId.description:
File record ID — set when a new file record was created.
Write this back to the record as avatarFileId (the link field key is 'avatarFile',
which the system stores as avatarFileId + avatarFileKey on the document).

initials.description: Initials string — set when type is 'personImageFieldInitials'

iconKey.description: Icon key — set when type is 'icon'
Unique identifier for the icon across the entire platform

iconName.description: Human-readable display name for the icon

sourceIconKey.description: The icon key within the source icon library (e.g., "user-circle" in Phosphor)

sourceIconLibrary.description: The icon library where this icon originates

customSvgPath.description: Path to custom SVG file (only for custom icons)

customSvgContent.description: Inline SVG content (only for custom icons)

tags.description: Tags for searching and categorizing icons

fontAwesomeFamily.description: Icon family for Font Awesome Pro - all families use 'regular' weight

parentRecordId.description: ID of the parent model record this field belongs to

key.description: Unique programmatic key for the field (auto-generated from name)

required.description: Whether this field is required when creating/editing a record

searchable.description: Whether this field is included in text searches

unique.description: Whether values must be unique across all records

hidden.description: Hide this field from all UI views

recommended.description: Surface this field as a quick-filter shortcut in listing screen filter menus

visible.description: Whether this field is visible in UI views (false hides it from forms and listings)

allowEdit.description: Whether this field can be edited by the user in detail forms

deriveFrom.description: Key of the field this field's value is derived from (e.g. "name")

deriveTransform.description: Transformation applied when deriving the value

defaultValue.description: Default value pre-populated when creating a new record

lookupValues.description: Array of option objects for lookup/status fields. Each item: { key, name, variant }.

model.description: Model key to link to (for link-type fields)
